role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and vegetation types consistent with the Yucatán.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed forest types and canopy structure without drifting into architecture.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (curbs, poles) and housing styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (poles + paint + roofing) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Mexico. The specialists provided grounded, image-consistent evidence, and the tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish Mexico from its closest regional analogs (Guatemala, Belize).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain, sandy soil, and corrugated roofs match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of tropical deciduous forest match the background vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of yellow curbs and concrete block houses match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of utility poles and house styles match the image.
